zh.Cheadle Hulme, Cheshire, England: 英國爾黑阿德爾 赫爾姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Stanley IV於1368年出生在英國爾黑阿德爾 赫爾姆時，他的父親William de Stanley39歲，母親Alice De Massey30歲。他於1385年與Margery de Hooton在英國爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1415年登記服兵役。他去世於1428年2月2日在英國藍卡爾享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾拉堂姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William de Stanley IV于1368年出生在英国爾黑阿德爾 赫爾姆时，他的父亲William de Stanley39岁，母亲Alice De Massey30岁。他于1385年与Margery de Hooton在英国爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1415年登记服兵役。他去世于1428年2月2日在英国藍卡爾享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾拉堂姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stanley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Stanley, including those in Yorkshire, Staffordshire, Derbyshire, Durham, Gloucestershire, and Wiltshire, named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This English name has been established in Ireland since the 13th century where it was Gaelicized as de Stainléigh.

English: possibly also a variant of Stoneley, a habitational name from Stoneley Green in Burland (Cheshire), Stoneleigh (Warwickshire), or Stonely in Kimbolton (Huntingdonshire), all named with Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of any of various like-sounding names in other languages, for example Polish Stanislawski , Greek Anastasiou , and Serbian Stojadinov (patronymic from the personal name Stojadin).

variants.name: Stanislawski
meanings: Polish (Stanisławski): habitational name for someone from any of various places called Stanisław, Stanisławów, or Stanisławice, named with the personal name Stanisław (see Stanislav ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Stanley IV was born in 1368, in Cheadle Hulme, Cheshire, England, his father, William de Stanley, was 39 and his mother, Alice De Massey, was 30. He married Margery de Hooton in 1385, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1415. He died on 2 February 1428, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in Lathom, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Stanley IV est né en 1368, à Cheadle Hulme, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Stanley, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Alice De Massey, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Margery de Hooton en 1385, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1415. Il est décédé le 2 février 1428, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Lathom, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1385 in Cheshire, England Margery de Hooton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1415 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 2. ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Stanley IVが1368年にイギリスチェシュアイアチェアドル ハルメで生まれた時，父William de Stanleyは39歳，母Alice De Masseyは30歳であった。1385年にイギリスチェシュアイアでMargery de Hootonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年に兵役登録をした。彼は1428年2月2日にイギリスランカシュアイアで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアラソムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Stanley IV(이)가 1368년 영국 체실르 체아들일 훌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Stanley(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice De Massey(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1385년 영국 체실르에서 Margery de Hooton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1428년 2월 2일 영국 랭카실르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 래톰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Stanley IV nasceu em 1368, em Cheadle Hulme, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Stanley, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Alice De Massey, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery de Hooton em 1385, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1415. Ele faleceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1428, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Lathom, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Stanley IV родился в 1368 г. в местности чидл хулм, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Stanley было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice De Massey, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery de Hooton в 1385 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. В 1415 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 2 февраля 1428 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности латом, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William de Stanley IV nació en 1368, en Cheadle Hulme, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Stanley, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Alice De Massey, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Margery de Hooton en 1385, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1415. Murió el 2 de febrero de 1428, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Lathom, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
